topics.title: Pirate Radio Broadcasts of Howard Stern
topics.summary: The studio discusses reports of illegal pirate radio stations broadcasting the show's content on FM frequencies in New Jersey and Brooklyn.

topics.title: Birthday Gifts and Media Interviews
topics.summary: The studio explores various birthday gifts received by the hosts, including a book with lion-shaped bookends, while discussing an upcoming dinner invitation from reporter Cindy Adams.

topics.title: Shawn's Medical Condition and Recovery
topics.summary: The studio discusses the medical status of Shawn, who suffered a stroke and heart complications, while also addressing his recovery and the impact on the Beetlejuice business.

topics.title: Club Visit and Celebrity Sightings
topics.summary: The studio features a call from a club worker who describes an evening where Kate Moss and Lindsay Lohan visited her establishment.

topics.title: Germ Concerns and Radio Show Transitions
topics.summary: The studio discusses a guest's use of gloves to avoid germs during public appearances, previews upcoming segments including an interview with director Eli Roth, and rehearses a comedy sketch before bidding farewell to George Takei.

topics.title: George Takei and David Letterman Interaction
topics.summary: The studio features guest George Takei as he prepares for an appearance on the David Letterman show, which includes a prank call from a producer posing as Letterman to rehearse a comedy list.

topics.title: George Takei's Experiences and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio features George Takei discussing his personal life, past relationships, and various celebrity interactions while the show also covers Sirius satellite radio technology.

topics.title: Pirate Radio and Show Transitions
topics.summary: The studio discusses reports of pirate radio stations broadcasting the show in various states, the transition from terrestrial to satellite radio, and the addition of a new announcer.

topics.title: Star Trek Trivia and Fan Interaction
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with a Star Trek fan who discusses his admiration for actor George Takei and shares trivia about the franchise.

topics.title: Sexual Fantasies and Radio Industry Rivalries
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where a caller describes an erotic fantasy involving physical intimacy and bondage before transitioning into a discussion regarding local radio competition and personal remarks made by a rival host.

topics.title: Radio Show Production and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including media personalities' reputations, internal production logistics, listener interactions, and upcoming segments featuring guest appearances.

topics.title: Gossip Game and Satellite Radio Transition
topics.summary: The studio hosts a gossip game with Mike Walker from the National Enquirer while discussing the transition to satellite radio and interacting with callers.

topics.title: Music, Pop Culture, and News Segment
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on classic rock performances, the career of Eminem, a segment on Star Trek history, and various news reports including celebrity earnings.

topics.title: Celebrity Earnings and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers a range of topics including celebrity salaries, reports of child abuse in Brooklyn, Pat Robertson's comments on Israel, the upcoming Martin Luther King Day, and the political implications of Supreme Court appointments.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Expansion and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses the transition of the show to satellite radio, the impact on local stations, celebrity news involving Angelina Jolie and Jude Law, and concludes with a guest appearance by George Takei.
